feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Skip assembly scrap calculation in production order
entry.content:
Hi all

In our company, we have products (rolls) that can be produced in 2 different ways:

  • The first way is via a new production run. In that case, assembly scrap needs to be applied.
  • Alternatively, the roll is produced by cutting a part of an existing roll. A separate production version exists for this. However, in that case, no assembly scrap needs to be taken into account.

As the first way of production is the default one, we entered assembly scrap in the material master. Now, we are looking for a solution to skip the assembly scrap for the 2nd way of production. Any idea how we can achieve this?

Regards

Joren

entry.title: What is the reason why the system state I0270 WCRE is triggered?
entry.content:
When SAP places a production order, the order cannot be released due to the system status of I0270 WCRE in the first operation. But I don't know what caused this state to be triggered, does anyone know?

在sap下达生产订单时，由于第一道工序里面有I0270 WCRE的系统状态导致订单无法下达。但是不清楚是什么原因导致这个状态被触发的，请问有人知道嘛？

entry.title: Special stock V 100125462 at customer 1000005577 does not exist
entry.content:
Special stock V 100125462 at customer 1000005577 does not exist

Message no. M7185

Diagnosis

No special stock V 100125462 exists at customer 1000005577 (batch 0001657040)

Procedure

Make sure your entries are correct.

Do you want to display the stock overview?

entry.title: Duplicate Monthly requirement periods in MD62 transaction
entry.content:
Hello

I have different versions, but there is no requirement for the month even though the month is duplicated.

Please provide some suggestions for the cause.

entry.title: BP customer not able to save as showing error as no entry of the field country
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a problem in BP. While creating a BP customer with role general it is showing error as ‘required filed country has no entry’. Although I have maintained the filed country.

Message no. R1304

entry.title: Error M3897 raised with parallel posting
entry.content:
While posting the Goods movement documents parallelly for same material and Plant combination, below error raised:
The plant data of the material & is locked by the user &


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Why are additions assigned with period control 6?
entry.content: Hi, we moved to S4 last year and just came back from maternity leave so sorry if this question sounds stupid but I need inputs on why are additions assigned with period control 6 - start of fiscal year? In one of our reviews with finance group managing depreciation, we need to explain how depreciation and period control works. Can someone share the rationale behind period control 6 for additions? I understand for initial year of acquisition but this one is for subsequent additions after initial cap. Thank you very much.

entry.title: I have a doubt on Adding Custom filed in SQ02 Query
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I created A Query in SQ02 ,I need to Link the Table VBRP and  /IDT/D_TAX_DATA.

So what I link VBRP-VBELN and /IDT/D_TAX_DATA-DOCUMENT and then when i try to Link VBRP-POSNER With /IDT/D_TAX_DATA Document Line Number Both have different  DATAELEMENT LENGHT .

so i Decided to create Additional filed in SQ02  with Name POSNER With Numeric 6 Length,

My question is How to Link VBRP POSNER And Additional Filed POSNER To get the DATA IN /IDT/D_TAX_DATA.

NOTE: After adding Additional filed During Table Link could not find custom filed. SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Community

entry.title: Transaction code KALC is not appearing in zeros
entry.content:
Hi, when I execute t-code KALC I am finding some document number that are not been cleared, for that reason the amount in my account is not zero, It works correctly some month ago....

I checked and all the FICO reconciliation ledger configuration is correct.

KALA- activate recon ledger

OBYN - Clearing account

Transaction GA0 and CO1 configured

OKKP- Has reconc ledger active

Do you have any idea why could be this difference?

entry.title: Oracle Security parameters
entry.content:
Hello SAP support,

We have some recommendations and would like to know if from SAP's point of view there are any restrictions to implementing them.
Can you help us analyze these recommendations?

Ensure 'extproc' Is Not Present in 'listener.ora'
Ensure 'GLOBAL_NAMES' Is Set to 'TRUE'
Ensure 'SEC_CASE_SENSITIVE_LOGON' Is Set to 'TRUE'
Ensure 'SEC_MAX_FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS' Is '3' or Less
Ensure 'SQL92_SECURITY' Is Set to 'TRUE'
Ensure '_trace_files_public' Is Set to 'FALSE'
Ensure 'RESOURCE_LIMIT' Is Set to 'TRUE'
Ensure 'FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS' Is Less than or Equal to '5'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME' Is Greater than or Equal to '1'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME' Is Less than or Equal to '90'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_REUSE_MAX' Is Greater than or Equal to '20'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_REUSE_TIME' Is Greater than or Equal to '365'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_GRACE_TIME' Is Less than or Equal to '5'
Ensure 'PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION' Is Set for All Profiles
Ensure 'INACTIVE_ACCOUNT_TIME' Is Less than or Equal to '120'
Ensure 'EXECUTE' is not granted to 'PUBLIC' on "Non-default" Packages - DBMS_IJOB
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked from Unauthorized 'GRANTEE' on 'AUD$' - Roles
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked from Unauthorized 'GRANTEE' on 'AUD$' - direct and indirect grants
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked on 'Sensitive' Tables - USER_HISTORY
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked on 'Sensitive' Tables - LINK$
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked on 'Sensitive' Tables - SCHEDULER$_CREDENTIAL
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked on 'Sensitive' Tables - USER$  - direct and indirect grants
Ensure 'ALL' Is Revoked on 'Sensitive' Tables - USER$ - Roles

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MTLS AUTHENTICATION BETWEEN SAP ECC/S4HANA SYSTEM AND THIRD PARTY APPLICATIONS
entry.content: We aim to implement mutual TLS (mTLS) authentication between an SAP on-premise system and third-party applications. However, there is a significant lack of documentation addressing this scenario. Therefore, could anyone confirm the feasibility of this configuration and provide the necessary configuration steps to achieve it?

entry.title: Email Trigger After Usage Decision
entry.content:
HI Team,

Good Day!

The requirement is after UD email automatically trigger. Anyone could you please what config I have to do?

 

Regards,

Rudra

entry.title: Withdrawing stock from material with material movement 221 shows zero
entry.content: While withdrawing stock for material  through movement type 221 the amount is shown as zero. Reservation  has WBS.. Expected is that amount should be shown when withdraw is done.. Could you please clarify if the amount is impacted based by the WBS element

entry.title: POD flow with movement 631
entry.content:
Hi all,

My customer wants to use the POD process for customer consignment flow. We have set suitable item category, schedule line category and everything works until the confirmation of the POD which gives the error:

"443 M7 E Enter a delivery for special stock T". The same process works well when it comes to movement 601 however when it comes to movement 631 this error is blocking the post good issue via VLPOD.

Can someone helps us out?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Why my User Defined Field does not refresh when other field changes
entry.content:
Hi Experts i create a UDF and a Query which compute number of days between two date using DATEDIFF and i want to show it to UDF Field, i setup it using FMS when AR Invoice due date field is change it will automatically compute to the UDF field the total Difference of my Posting Date and Due Date, but apparently it does not refresh at all. here is a sample of my code.

DATEDIFF(DAY,U_CounterDate,T0.DocDate + 10 ) FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0.[DocNum] = $[OINV.DocNum]

entry.title: Definition of fixed and variable cost in SAP BP for SaaS company.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on the Advisory Service Project. We are in the process of designing a Profitability Analysis that aligns with SaaS businesses under the ECC 6.0 Ehp7 version.

I have a couple of questions regarding SAP Best Practices for the cloud(SaaS) industry:

1. How are fixed costs and variable costs defined and differentiated within the context of SAP Best Practices for Saas industries?

2. Does SaaS Industry also use Standard Price to measure standard cost for cost management?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Delivery complete indicator reset issue in Service PO
entry.content:
Hi,

In service Purchase order, we are marking line item wise delivery completed indicator manually when we don’t require service anymore/ short close of service PO.

When user cancels service entry sheet of that po using tcode ML81N then system will reset delivery complete indicator in service PO. My business wants to restrict it or give warning message at the time of SES reversal.

Request you to suggest way forward

Regards,

Bhaumik Modi

entry.title: Change the start time of one of the operations for production order on CM25
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Please advise the following scenario -

I'm able to change the start time of one operation for a production order via drag & drop functionality on CM25, but the operations that follow the changed operation are not automatically rescheduled. The relationship between operations in routing is sequential (standard sequence).

Is it possible to make all following operations be automatically rescheduled when one operation is rescheduled?

Thanks,

Yimin

entry.title: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager in SAP RISE
entry.content:
Background: Planning a migration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Rise) and concerned about the future of certain tools that we are currently using:

Questions 1) Currently have SAP Solution Manager 7.2 in SQL Server 2012 on premise and  would like to know if it is worth planning some type of SQL Server upgrade for this project or is there any other tool that will replace the functionality of the Solution Manager in SAP Rise ?

Question 2) Having 2 PI servers (Process Integrator 7.5) in SQL Server 2012 on premise that act as middleware between the ERP and (SAP SuccessFactors or SAP Concur), and want to know the same way in this conversion process / migration to SAP Rise, how would this component function in the new Rise architecture, will it be replaced by which tool?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Note 2469139 Resolve findings of core ERP PP-MRP S/4and Its Impact on S4 Migration
entry.content:
We are currently working on the migration to S4, specifically addressing inconsistencies related to MRP through the readiness check. Concurrently, we have a request from our client to activate the planning area, which requires the creation of two planning areas that include several warehouses.

Upon reviewing note 2469139, we encountered a concern regarding the verification ID MRP_AREA_CUSTOMIZING_007, which states the following:

"Try not to combine different storage locations into one MRP planning area."

This recommendation is particularly concerning since our client's request involves including multiple storage locations in a single planning area. We would like to understand how this setup might impact the S4 migration, given that we are assigning multiple warehouses to a single planning area.

We appreciate your attention to this matter and look forward to your guidance on how to proceed without compromising the integrity of the migration process.

Best regards,
